info.name: HMS Receptionist Dashboard API Collection
info.description: Comprehensive Postman collection for all APIs used by the HMS Receptionist Dashboard. Divided into OPD, IPD, Emergency (ER), Operating Theatre (OT), Patient Services, and Billing/Cashier operations.

request.description: Quick lookup used as the first step for every patient interaction. Searches by name, phone, or UHID.
Registers a new patient with details. Automatically sets patient_id in globals on success.

exec: console.log("Patient registered. patient_id set to: " + jsonData.data.id);

request.description: Creates a placeholder patient record when identity is unknown. All fields optional.

exec: console.log("Temp Patient registered. patient_id set to: " + jsonData.data.id);

request.description: Upgrades TEMP-EMG-... UHID to permanent PAT-YYYY-XXXX. All clinical records remain linked.
Fetch patient demographic card details.
Setup attendant details for IPD admission.
Setup insurance policy details for billing.
OPD dashboard today overview of total appointments, checked-in, completed, cancellations, and doctor queue length.
View metrics dashboard for a specific date.
Retrieve and filter appointments.
Shortcut for loading current day's appointment list.
Shortcut to load appointment list by date.
Get detail status and timeline of a single appointment.
Book an outpatient appointment ticket.

exec: console.log("Appointment booked. appointment_id set to: " + jsonData.data.id);

request.description: Confirms payment and checks the patient into the queue. Generates queue token server-side.
Update appointment status (e.g., ARRIVED, NO_SHOW, CANCELLED).
Retrieve waitlist/token position for checked-in patient.
Creates a walk-in OPD appointment without prior booking. Starts in PENDING_PAYMENT state.

body.raw:
{
  "patient_id": "{{patient_id}}",
  "doctor_id": "{{doctor_id}}",
  "department_id": "{{department_id}}",
  "chief_complaint": "Mild fever and cough",
  "notes": "Patient walked in directly"
}

exec: console.log("Walk-in registered. appointment_id set to: " + jsonData.data.id);

request.description: Returns real-time consultation queue with wait positions.
Preview the next token that will be assigned for the doctor.
Retrieve hospital departments list.
Retrieve list of doctors under department with queue lengths.
Get doctor time slot schedules.
Inpatient KPI stats: total admitted, emergency, pending discharges, bed occupancy.
Ward-by-ward vacancy/occupancy tracking.
Real-time locations of all admitted patients.
Wards list with filter parameters.
Beds grid list inside ward.
Details of specific bed.
Aggregated bed capacity counts.
Put bed under maintenance/maintenance release.
Inbox of pending doctor recommendation notes for admission.
Initiate an admission request from receptionist dashboard.

exec: console.log("Admission request created. id set to: " + jsonData.data.id);

request.description: Change status (READY, UNDER_REVIEW, CANCELLED) of request.
Officially admit patient and reserve bed.

exec: console.log("Admission created. admission_id set to: " + jsonData.data.id);

request.description: Fetch active admitted patient list.
Get details of admission file.
Transfer patient to another bed / ward.
Creates four parallel clearance gates (NURSING, DIAGNOSTIC, PHARMACY, BILLING) in PENDING status.
Update status of discharge clearance gate.
Finalizes discharge checklist once all 4 gates are CLEARED. Releases bed.
Intake form for emergency patients, triages colors and sets ambulance/walkin info.

body.raw:
{
  "patient_id": "{{patient_id}}",
  "triage_level": "RED",
  "arrival_mode": "AMBULANCE",
  "chief_complaint": "Severe chest pain and sweating",
  "assigned_doctor_id": "{{doctor_id}}",
  "notes": "Brought in by bystanders"
}

exec: console.log("Emergency visit created. visit_id set to: " + jsonData.data.id);

request.description: List active ER cases sorted by severity triage level.
Update emergency process status (TRIAGED, UNDER_TREATMENT, ADMITTED, DISCHARGED).
Assign bed to emergency patient.
Reserve OT slot and map clinical staff.

exec: console.log("OT session created. id set to: " + jsonData.data.id);

request.description: Fetch surgical schedule details.
Retrieve checklist of required surgical consents.
Generate required consent templates for the surgical case.
Digitally capture authorization signatures.
Update Anaesthetist fit-for-surgery check.
Submit checklist checks before patient enters theatre.
Record surgery start timestamp.
End surgical log and dispatch bed in recovery ward.
Calculate outstanding balance for patient admission.
Override billing blocks for credit/charity exclusions.
Settle payments for bills and generate receipts.
Generate a billing invoice.

exec: console.log("Invoice generated. invoice_id set to: " + jsonData.data.id);

request.description: Load lines items and bill breaks of single invoice.
